description: Tissue (~1cm) from adult colonies in Kaneohe Bay Hawaii were clipped with bone cutters, snap-frozen in liquid nitrogen, and stored at -80C until processing.
grant: NSF Award Number 2237658 to Katie L Barott. Directorate for Geosciences, Division Of Ocean Sciences. 2023.
